MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_PEN.title: Hiro's Pen
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_PEN.description: At the start of each combat, gain 3 Justice.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_PEN.flavor: A pen Hiro often used in middle school. It should have already been given to Yuki.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_WITCH_FACTOR.title: Witch Factor
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_WITCH_FACTOR.descript: Whenever you play an Attack, gain 15 Witchification. Whenever you play a Skill or Power, lose 10 Witchification.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_WITCH_FACTOR.flavor: When the witch factor becomes too active, people lose reason and turn into dangerous monster-like beings.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_WITCHGRIMOIRE.title: Witch Grimoire
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_WITCHGRIMOIRE.descrip: Upon obtaining, randomly generate 13 cards from Hiro's card pool. Choose any number to add to your deck.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_WITCHGRIMOIRE.flavor: A grimoire filled with everything, written all about Hiro's story.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_WITCHGRIMOIRE.selecti: Choose cards to add to your deck
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_DISMANTLEDPARTS.title: Dismantled Parts
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_DISMANTLEDPARTS.descr: Gain 1 Energy at the start of each turn. On the first turn, automatically play all Attack cards targeting random enemies.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_DISMANTLEDPARTS.flavo: Parts dismantled from some ancient device, still seemingly functional.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_MAGICSNIPIRRIFLE.desc: Gain 1 ammo when entering a node (max 6). At the start of each turn, consume 1 ammo to add a [b]Bullet[/b] to your hand.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_MAGICSNIPIRRIFLE.flav: A ranged weapon crafted with witch technology, every bullet infused with magic.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_BLOODIEDCLOTHING.desc: Lose 26 [b]max HP[/b]. Enchant all Skill cards in your deck with [b]Adroit[/b].
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_BLOODIEDCLOTHING.flav: The price is flesh, the reward is infinite wisdom.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_FRUITPLATE.title: Fruit Plate of Memories
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_FRUITPLATE.descriptio: Upon obtaining, choose 1 card from your deck to enchant with [b]Ema's Apple[/b] (gain 1 max HP when played).
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_FRUITPLATE.flavor: A fruit plate Ema brought on a distant afternoon.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_FRUITPLATE.selectionS: Choose 1 card to enchant with Ema's Apple
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_SAFE.title: Safe
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_SAFE.description: Upon obtaining, choose 1 of 2 random relics to obtain.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_SAFE.flavor: An unknown safe left behind, seemingly hiding something valuable.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_MAGICALSKETCHBOOK.des: At the start of each combat, gain 3 stacks of [b]Crimson Butterfly[/b].
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_MAGICALSKETCHBOOK.fla: A sketchbook filled with crimson butterflies, each one seemingly recording something.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_MLLNOTE.title: Note
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_MLLNOTE.description: Upon obtaining, remove all [red]Death Rewind[/red] from your deck, then gain a new [red]Death Rewind[/red].
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_MLLNOTE.flavor: The contract reads: with the end of the old, a new beginning is granted.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_RITUALSWORD.title: Ritual Sword
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_RITUALSWORD.descripti: Upon obtaining, add a [b]Witch Rest Ceremony[/b] to your deck.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_RITUALSWORD.flavor: This sword has witnessed countless witch rest ceremonies.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_EXTERNALINFORMATION.d: When entering a node, choose 1 card to upgrade. Lose 3 [b]max HP[/b] for each card upgraded.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_EXTERNALINFORMATION.f: The price of information is always heavier than expected.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_EMASRIBBON.title: Ema's Ribbon
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_EMASRIBBON.flavor: A ribbon carefully kept by Ema.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_EMAWITCHFACTOR.title: Witch Factor
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_EMAWITCHFACTOR.descri: Whenever you play an Attack, gain 15 Witchification. Whenever you play a Skill or Power, lose 10 Witchification.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_EMAWITCHFACTOR.flavor: When the witch factor becomes too active, people lose reason and turn into dangerous monster-like beings.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_TRIALBADGE.title: Trial Badge
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_TRIALBADGE.descriptio: At the start of each combat, automatically enchant cards by keyword: Agreement→Agreement, Rebuttal→Rebuttal, Doubt→Doubt. Reset enchantment counters each turn.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_TRIALBADGE.flavor: A badge carrying the will of judgment, witnessing every verdict.
